reviews.review_description: The game is great and has a lot of potential for popularity. There is an awesome community in multiplayer(I met a huge group of nice lvl 10s) and single player is really immersive. Just one thing, the cockpits are somewhat bland. I want more buttons, switches, levers, pulleys, and everything a normal cockpit would have. Other than that, the devs did a GREAT job at making this masterpiece.

If you found Warplanes: WW1 Fighters too easy, this game might make you very happy.

It's too difficult for me, right from the first mission. I also found that I prefer the style of the older planes. I'm going to go back and replay their earlier flight sim.

I'm requesting a refund but I'm only knocking off one star because of the lack of difficulty settings. This developer makes high quality games, but unfortunately this one just isn't for me.

This game plus the other two have been some of my most played games on my headset, but most of my issues come from this game, i will list them out (the ones I found) #1: The fighters with the tail gunners...please nerf them, I take 3 hits and Im falling out of the sky, theres one level I can't beat because those fighters tear me up immediately. #2: The boats on non sea maps are either levitating, or they are going into the ground. #3: I don't care but its annoying, decrease the number of flack guns on land maps please, many times thats the reason I die because of the damage and the number of them. If you read this game creator, please know I have no hard feelings, just want to have a good time in game without glitches or dying every second. 👌

My absolute favoute WWII fighter pilot game. ENDLESS. hours of fun both in single player & also multiplayer with my Pals.

I SO HOPE the devs will do an update or off-shoot of more WWII air battles because ....... well ................ 😁🙂😄😘😜😆😄 "WARPLANES - Battles Over EUROPE" would be AMAZING!!!

OK this game is perfect. It just needs better physics. Just add a few more planes and also add more buttons. You need to be like DC S or war thunder because everyone would buy this game if it had more buttons more missions and it’s pretty cool overall ￼just please add more buttons and also one of the point out you should have a setting or a plane that you can switched through the back gunner seat and the front of the plane. Also, there should be a bombing machine where you can be in like a B 29 or some big bomber and that would be so cool so good game just needs more.

I originally bought this game just wanting to have fun and experience flying planes in Vr, at first I was having a lot of fun but as I progressed through the single player mode, the missions just kept on getting harder and harder which is frustrating. And don’t get me started on the enemy planes that suddenly decide to ignore physics and effortlessly out turn you, I wish their was an option to turn this off, but over then that this is a great game with a high skill ceiling

This game is sucks cuz the enemy are tri hards no matter what difficulty you on

and its not really worth it bc you would do the same thing plus it would more if y'all added back gunners on the US aircraft instead of glazing the japanese aircraft

reviews.review_title: Love this game but improvements needed
reviews.review_description:
I have flown this game for a couple years now and absolutly love it and the community. Most often turning my meta on just for this game alone. The improvements needed that will keep more players flying and more people in the servers being less likely to leave due to low player numbers are as follows. 
1. When logging on and looking for a match, to be able to see what all matches are running and what gamestyle.
2. As long as a currently running match/s is not full whether it started with less than 8 or have people that leave, to be able to start in the middle and enjoy the time instead of waiting for a possible match conclusion.
3. An update to maps and possible additional planes with the ability to select the map wanted when setting up match. All still related to WWII, and to be completely honest the community could really do without the water only map, most of us leave it and restart for having terrain. 

Thank you for the consideration. Many of us would be greatful to see improvements like these
It was fun until I was the only one who ever played the game

reviews.review_title: Very good game! But needs more…
reviews.review_description: I love this game It is so much fun to play! and me and my friend both love playing it with each other it is a great multiplayer experience and single player experience, but it could have more in multiplayer mode or even in single player. Could we have a tailgunner where one of your friends can be the tail gunner or you can be the tail gunner or an NPC other than that, the game is really good, but I don’t want you guys to leave this game behind in the dirt
I like this game because I’m interested in planes ever since I was little, the realistic physics, the ￼planes , everything I like. 5 star review. 👍

The me 262 is a ww2 fighter jet 
And German  intercepter fits the strict ww2 time frame

Can you guys make another game like this, but with World War II planes from all corps in ww2 and like add the Stuka 

And more immersive in the game ￼￼￼

I’m giving it a two because of the flight and battle is making you feel real, which is great however for a Deaf person/gamer this is not a Deaf or Hard of Hearing friendly, because their is an audio background in which I presume that they are ordered in mission for you to do what you have to do. I can not understand what it’s been saying and also there is no Subtitles to support in the settings, also Live captions can’t support it either 😓.

If the designer or person who made this would make it accessible for Deaf/HoH gamers, it will be awesome. 

I do get the paper instructions on the side of the cockpit but it’s very limited.

reviews.review_title: Step down from their WW1 game
reviews.review_description:
In the WW1 game you can be many different armies and had good voice work.

This game you can only be Americans on the pacific front and the voice doesn’t sound like someone from WW2 era. Just a generic Nolan North voice that doesn’t sound immersive which can be annoying. 
Better than a AI voice though.

Since the WW1 game was so great in every department this game was a big let down. 

It’s a really fun game but since it’s missing so much features from before I can’t rate it high.

This is one of the best Oculus games out there. Nicely done. It would be amazing if these developers were able to join up with Star Wars and put you in the cockpit of an x-wing and other popular SWs ships.

One of the best VR apps in existence.

Place a flashlight or a toy kaleidoscope tube or the like through the strap of the right hand VR hand grip. Then place the entire set up under your legs stretch straight out and not too far forward or too far backward off course. You can intuit it. 
This creates a structural realism.

reviews.review_title: THE MISSION TO WAKE ISLAND GLITCH
reviews.review_description:
After shooting down 6 enemy aircraft, with 13 to go, 4 more are repeatedly added to the planes remaining. Over and over, I can never get below 13. It’s like the movie Groundhog Day. There’s no way to win. Doesn’t work that way in real combat, and shouldn’t occur with VR. Frustrating as hell. How do you fix it? Also, it would be advantageous to have a rearview mirror to “check your six,” just like a real WWII fighter. I’m a former pilot/instructor and have been to Wake, by courtesy of the USAF.

Now, having played Warplanes for nine months, I”ve discovered a place for camaraderie amongst the regulars who’ve played the game since it was first introduced, and up-and-coming regulars like myself. This game is addictive, as many of us will attest to. Although an experienced pilot with acrobatic skills, I still get an increased heart rate and sweaty palms when competing in a Death Match, i.e., aerial combat with equal or higher-skilled pilots. Every match is different because it’s played with real people, not AI.

This has been one of my favorite games for quite some time, but there are a couple things it's missing. I would love a custom difficulty option similar to WW1. I like how much more immersive the game feels without the hud, but the added difficulty can be frustrating. Having the option to remove the hud while remaining on the simulation difficulty would be great!
I have played this for so much time and its very fun. Please add flap animations and maybe some more startup featurs.
The levels used to be beatable. Now I can’t pass any levels. The bombers shred my plane to pieces within seconds. I have 5 different planes yet I can’t last more than a couple of minutes.
I am happy to say I have really enjoyed playing this game very nostalgic and it touched everything I have ever desired about flying those old planes.
It was fun until boats had flak and bomber killled you in a millisecond, I wish I could get a refund

Game forces you to fly level constantly fighting controls. Control is not adjustable. 

ww1 game is total better. A whole different game

developer_response.body:
Please check the training missions. In case of any difficulties with them, just refer to our little FAQ:
https://www.homenetgames.com/warplanes-battles-over-pacific/article/bop-prologue-guide/

Generally, it might be a good idea to check the whole "Guides and features" section from:
https://www.homenetgames.com/warplanes-battles-over-pacific/
With an emphasis on Squadron management.

Other than that, less obvious hints might consist of the following:
Rudder control - you can steer with the rudder while aiming using the left thumbstick.
Flaps control - you can control them while holding the yoke with your virtual hand and using the right thumbstick (up/down movements).

reviews.review_description: All I can say the game is great the people that you play with are nice and I'm sure you will love it. So once again enjoy.

Great gameplay very fun. The sites are cool seating position and grabbing the throttle and stick . Very good graphics in the plane are very good and the other planes on the ground isn’t as good but that doesn’t matter much five out of five stars. ￼

reviews.review_title: It was good, but it needs some updates
reviews.review_description:
I've been playing for a year, and I like the game a lot, but I just wish there was more customization to the planes and the player can create their own style of plane and color, I just wish there was like a spray paint feature where we could spray paint the planes the way we want it. Also, I wish we could combine certain armaments because historical evidence says that some planes can have both bombs and rockets like the p51d Mustang, for example. The p 51 could have 6 rockets and 2 bombs but we can't have both in the game.Also the fore rate and sounds of the machine guns are boring and slow,and I want some hard-core loud and fast machine gun firing that is entertaining and historicaly accurate. It would be cool if some of the planes could whistle when diving and have cooler sound effects. 
More planes need to be added as well and more positions like machine gunners or bombers. For example the sbd dauntless should be added and also have switchable positions to be on the machine gun in the back and let the ai take control of the plane while the player takes control as the machine gunner (also make the fire rate very high)
Also custom maps should be added because the same old maps get really boring. For example Iwo Jima should be added and we should have the people on the ground shoot at us. We just want more mods and maps for the game so we don't have to ask for stuff. So please make a modding feature to add custom planes,maps and more
Overall, the game play is good, and I would recommend it for beginners, but I wish the game would get an update where we get the features I've listed

This game is fun. No dowt about it. But It needs updates. Please add more planes, like b-24 bombers, and to where multiple people could be in the plane. New maps, German planes, and a game mode where you can be aa. Also, new sounds and better physics. Please make coms better, meaning wors. Where you can have your com's fail and it crackle and cut out when people talk. Also, please make it to where you can have friendly ai with you.
Also, some natural events like thunderstorms  and light rain. Also, make the ai a little better and to where they chase you instead of following their path. 
I'll probably say more, but for now, those are the things I want to see.
Thanks for making the game.

This is so bad its
 unplayable
Amazing game with simple controls. Well recommended 👍🏻
Really fun but if you play to long you get very motion sick
Awesome game puts you into the action and worth the buy!!

reviews.review_title: Its cool, but multiplayer kinda sucks
reviews.review_description:
This game is a very realistic and fun air combat sim.
  

The only problem is multiplayer, you either sit in a lobby for 15 minutes untill it starts, or there is no lobby at all.
There are not a lot of people in lobbies and the content is lacking. The controls also suck.

developer_response.body:
Our community comes from different time zones, so it may also be a good idea to check the Private Lobby, thanks to which you can start a multiplayer game with your friends at any time. It is also worth considering joining our discord:
https://discord.gg/ntPmutN

Where there is always another pilot you can fly with. It is also worth mentioning that multiplayer is cross platform, so you won't be limited just to one platform.

There are also FB groups for VR fans of the Warplanes trilogy, where they regularly meet in closed games, but are also eager to welcome new members interested in playing together.

reviews.review_description: Pretty fun but could use bombers and other factions
I didnt like this game at 1st attempt....then I gave it another go, learned the controls better and now I love this game !!!!

reviews.review_title: The game is great, but can be way better
reviews.review_description:
I love the game it is very engaging and has fun combat, its controls was quite fun, but like i have seen in the reviews i do agree with one person who said that we need rearview mirrors to be able to keep track of whats behind us better, i also have experienced some glitches but its minor inconveniences mostly,  but aside from that it has a lot going for it, i will say it is one of my favorite games i have so far, yet i still have not tried many pilot games, i would still say it was a great way to learn my interest in them.

I would love more updates to the game and maybe more planes, I would also love it if there was a free roam mode where you could just fly around the world and see certain places, another great idea would be if they added an true free roam open world fighting version where you battled based on events going on at the moment, but these are probably pretty big and hard to do, but i see a lot of potential in updates and this game becoming massive and an more popular game if things like what i mentioned happened, especially if you added open world and multiple modes to multiplayer.
The app says multiplayer must be updated but not how

developer_response.body:
Please make sure that the firmware in your Quest is updated to the latest version. You can check that under: Quick settings / Settings / General / Software update

On the topic of the game itself - to make sure it is up to date, please check: Library / 3 dots (visible at the top-right, when you hover over the game) / Update (alternatively: 'see details' and there 'update')

In case of any further difficulties, please contact our support via:
https://www.homenetgames.com/support/

reviews.review_title: Flight Simulators Ruined It For Me
reviews.review_description:
At first quite fun flying these historical aircraft. I think what ruined it for me was playing actual flight simulators. This is an arcade game, so you wouldn’t expect a lot of realism, but some of it becomes glaring when you recognize it. Take-offs and landings are almost motionless; but, the real problem is that enemy planes will often fly in physically impossible ways sort of zipping up and down sharply in tight circles. Just too glaring for me to enjoy anymore. 

Still pretty fun if you ignore some things.

This game is great for people who would like to own a WWll game that allows you to fly around and shoot down others and enemy planes, ships, and camps. I really love this game. 10/10 would play millions more times
Good game however the crosshairs for the planes are inaccurate big and have nothing to ￼￼ lead with. Developers if you see this add change able cross hairs pls. But overall you made a good game￼

reviews.review_title: Multiplayer set up needs to change
reviews.review_description:
The people who play this game are insufferable. People join and are waiting to play and then the host kicks you out because you aren't level 10 or because you have muted your mic. Or they spend 20minutes lecturing you about not leaving mid match. The game should just put 8 people together without allowing the host to delay starting the game because their friends are about to join from another session. 

The game itself is great.
I enjoy this game but it needs some updates
Reminds me a bit of pacific air world gold and I love it
I love this game i really wish you can play as both sides and fly the bombers and dive bombers to

I wish there was more fighters like the bf109 or a bomber mode with the b29 or the b17 or maybe a strike mode to with planes like the a36 and the Corsair. Please take this in to consideration 
                              Thank you
Why are support planes useless? Makes the game way less fun than it would be.

This really had me feeling like a fighter pilot, i wouldve given it a four star if it didnt have almost zero ccu, theres a mulitplayer option but ive not been able to play it yet. Ussauly there are only around 2-10 players online sometimes you will be the only one. This was very dissapointing. Luckily there are no micro transactions which make this awesome.

That was my first game of the series. I liked the graphics and the cockpit experience is quite immersive. At the beginning it may be less interesting as you struggle with planes that are not very good and you have to be patient with the shooting and the turning mechanics. Plus, objectives are not always clear. I'd like a more interesting campaign mode with an actual storyline. However, it is quite fun playing while laying back.

reviews.review_description:
Love this game, as well as the WW1 version, but would love to be able to target a few enemy aircraft carriers. 
Would also love to see a  Battle of Britain edition set in the skies over southern England and the Channel in 1940.

I run it theough games optimiser and it looks and feels amazing.  Night missions, buy planes and upgrades with ingame points only, feels absolutely brilliant when your looking out your windows and dogfighting, bombing, torpedoung, kamikaze’ing.

Single player missions or online multiplayer is thw creamon the cake.

I usually suck at flying planes but really enjoyed the feel of this and was able to learn to shoot without the aim assist and different maneuvers. The only issue is the multiplayer is dead in all servers. I bought the WW1 version because it said online was popular on the web but it's also dead.
The 4 stars is because you can't free roam and there isn't much variety in the missions

I will move this to 5 stars when I get an explanation on how to play the campaign co-op. This should without doubt be a feature and my brother and I cannot figure out how to do it. It works on PC, but not here.

developer_response.body:
The functionality offered by Warplanes: Battles over Pacific on PC is identical to that of the version for Standalone VR. 

At any time, you can play a mission of your choice in co-op or raid mode (a series of consecutive missions).

on the online mode
bullet fly same direction
inspite of any direction of plane

developer_response.body:
Could you please share with us more details about the exact nature of the issue and conditions where you encountered such behavior? Please don't hesitate to reach out through our website: 
https://www.homenetgames.com/support/

Some of the planes are equipped with rear-facing guns (which is historically accurate), is it possible that they misled you?

reviews.review_description:
This game is fantastic! It's a ton of fun tailing Japanese pilots and clawing at them with the guns and cannons. Each aircraft has a few unique feels and some minor differences. Mostly, though, they all kind of feel and behave the same. I did notice that the Enemy aircraft far exceed their capabilities. The twin engine Kawasakis could never pull those kinds of gs without breaking apart and the smaller craft are far more agile than your own. This is not accurate, as the F4U and P51 are especially nimble fighters. They could easily outmaneuver any plane in the roster. 

I do wish there was a vibration function relative to pulling the yoke, so that you can feel the plane being pushed to its limit. This would give a more immersive and intense experience when dogfighting. In the loadout, an option could be present to take lighter ammunition for the guns in order to have more cannon rounds/rockets or bombs. Also, your friendlies should get shot down, not just "return to base". It's war, there are casualties on both sides. The game hasn't been properly updated in over 2 years. Keep it alive, devs

The game looks great and is challenging, unfortunately I got really motion sick but the options in game to reduce it did help a little.. Makes me wish I had one of those arcade chairs that move with the plane because it is a really good fighter plane game
Can’t play with people despite it being advertised as multiplayer

You have to check the flaps magic, it allows plane to stop in the air.

I waited and waited, been reading reviews, and finally jumped in.

I have been playing for 2 days and this is my bottom line - it’s worth the buy.

If you have no experience with flight sims, you may struggle a lot.  I disagree with the negative reviews out there regarding the game controls.  Game controls are fine…absolutely fine.  I was able to play and do missions right away.

There is Co-op multiplayer, Vs. Multiplayer, single player, upgrades, plane upgrades, different missions.  I am hooked!  

Well done guys….well done!
Endless flying in circles trying to shoot a plane , yawn

Is their a campaign in single player. Level after level I didn’t see an ending in the single player game. I was told that there is and It is a very fun game. The graphics are awesome and the game itself is great. Although maybe adding new maps and more details to the existing maps.
My new favorite game even  tho its hard at first you get the hang or it i totally recommend,steal for 20$￼
Great fun game ! Worth it !

Which I am ￼￼￼
If you own a phone you should get the mobile version of the game it's not as fun but it is really fun not as good as the VR version

reviews.review_description: You cannot hit a goddamn enemy plane it is so hard like once you lineup they’ll just pull up and it is impossible to hit them. They can go up so much faster and turn so much faster. They can pull up so much faster. It’s so unfair. ￼
I play a good amount of VR but this game is really difficult for me

I'm a former pilot and just trying to  learn the controls. I got them all now except the flaps in flight.  I gotta say that this replicates real flight. I'll be ready to challange my friends after a bit more practise. Can someone help me with the flaps in flight. A tutorial would have been helpful.

developer_response.body:
Please check the training missions. In case of any difficulties with them, just refer to our little FAQ:
https://www.homenetgames.com/warplanes-battles-over-pacific/article/bop-prologue-guide/

Generally - it might be a good idea to check the whole "Guides and features" section from:
https://www.homenetgames.com/warplanes-battles-over-pacific/
With an emphasis on Squadron management.

Other than that - less obvious hints might consist of the following:
rudder control - you can steer with rudder while aiming using the left thumbstick.
flaps control - you can control them while holding the yoke with your virtual hand and using the right thumbstick (up/down movements).

On the topic of using bombs - pay attention to a light next to the BOMBS section on the dashboard. It flashes blue when the moment to drop the bomb is right. Another little convenience would be to look through the glass in front of you and check the special green viewfinder (it should appear when you have bombs in your loadout and are diving down, with your nose pointed down at ~60°). Lastly - remember to use the flaps during this maneuver, as when the plane is slowed down you should be able to deal with ground targets more efficiently, even without bombs whatsoever.

reviews.review_description: It's OK For Free I Would Never Pay Full Price.
It sucks get warplane Corp instead
I was lucky I got it for free and now it's $20

This is a pretty easy to learn and fun flight VR using some beautifully rendered World War II planes. Graphics are fine for this level on the Quest 3S and I’m really enjoying it. Some of the night flying levels are difficult, but really an overall fun experience. ￼Definitely worth the cost. Bonus? Flying a P51 Mustang!

To a degree, until your ships shoot you out of the sky... No joke, watched my own destroyer while I'm tryna defend a convoy, blow me up out of the sky. No enemies near me cuz I just killed one coming back to convoy. No excuses 🙏 Quality under quantity with this company

This game is so realistic and so fun as a ww2 enthusiast. I recommend you buy this game. There only one thing they’re missing, they need the help from the Philippines, Mexico, and Brazil since they helped fight in the pacific. At least add flags of these country’s on their planes.
Just what Quest needs. Relatively lightweight but still immersive. A nice balance between realism and “game”. A great addition to my library and one of my top games!
I am good at flight simulator 2020 VR. In this the controls are significantly less polished and the graphics are much worse. Play flight sim and skip this. Worst MQ+ title so far.
